name: European FinTech IPO Company 1 B.V.
summary: European FinTech IPO Company 1 B.V. is a blank check company which intends to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or related business combination with businesses or entities. It focuses on the financial services and financial services technology sectors. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
